description:
The same `
` raw-content element WITH its matching `
` close tag does NOT fire E-CTX-001 (§4.17).
rationale: §4.17 scopes the E-CTX-001 Closer-recovery diagnostic to the case where EOF is reached BEFORE the matching close tag. Here recognition resumes at the matching ``, so the opener is terminated and no closer recovery is performed — E-CTX-001 SHALL stay silent. This is the negative twin of block-ctx-001-unterminated-raw-content-pos: identical source but for the close tag, isolating the closer as the sole trigger. It also pins that the raw-content body (`const x = 1;`) is inert text per §4.17 and does not itself provoke a context diagnostic.
